SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS NOAH LITWER AND VINCENT THOMAS WURM ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY SHELLEY NAGATA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITWER, NOAH WURM, VINCENT THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAGATA, KIMBERLY SHELLEY $2,293.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,393.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY JOINTLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NAGATA, KIMBERLY SHELLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LITWER, NOAH WURM, VINCENT THOMAS PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
